sources.doc: SINAMICS G120C List Manual (LH13, 04/2014, A5E33840768B AA)
sources.excerpt: F07011 Drive: Motor overtemperature — Cause: The motor temperature has exceeded the fault threshold (p0605).

sources.doc: SINAMICS G120C List Manual (LH13, 04/2014, A5E33840768B AA)
sources.excerpt: F30001 Power unit: Overcurrent — Cause: The power unit has detected an overcurrent condition.

sources.doc: SINAMICS G120C List Manual (LH13, 04/2014, A5E33840768B AA)
sources.excerpt: F30002 Power unit: DC link voltage overvoltage — Cause: The power unit has detected an overvoltage condition in the DC link.

sources.doc: SINAMICS G120C List Manual (LH13, 04/2014, A5E33840768B AA)
sources.excerpt: F30003 Power unit: DC link voltage undervoltage — Cause: The power unit has detected an undervoltage condition in the DC link.

sources.doc: SINAMICS G120C List Manual (LH13, 04/2014, A5E33840768B AA)
sources.excerpt: F30004 Power unit: Overtemperature heat sink AC inverter — Cause: The temperature of the power unit heat sink has exceeded the permissible limit value.

sources.doc: SINAMICS G120C List Manual (LH13, 04/2014, A5E33840768B AA)
sources.excerpt: F30005 Power unit: Overload I2t — Cause: The power unit was overloaded (r0036 = 100 %).

sources.doc: SINAMICS G120C List Manual (LH13, 04/2014, A5E33840768B AA)
sources.excerpt: F30011 Power unit: Line phase failure in main circuit — Cause: At the power unit, the DC link voltage ripple has exceeded the permissible limit value.

sources.doc: SINAMICS G120C List Manual (LH13, 04/2014, A5E33840768B AA)
sources.excerpt: F30012 Power unit: Temperature sensor heat sink wire breakage — Cause: The connection to a heat sink temperature sensor in the power unit is interrupted.

verification.method: every fault name + parameter name read from the PDF text layer; page numbers are the manual's printed pages
verification.note: Replaces the unverifiable 'Operational Instructions (0319_en-US)' citations: F30006-F30010 and p0104/p0105/p0293/p0644/p0645 do not exist in the manual and were removed; all remaining meanings corrected to the manual's verbatim names.
